channel.title: Forgebook
channel.description: A notebook-first AI cookbook. Jupyter notebook examples and tutorials.

item.title: Create Your First Agent (Part 1)
item.description: Step-by-step tutorial to deploy gpt-5-mini on Microsoft Foundry, create an AI agent with Web Search, and test it — all from the Foundry portal. Part 1 of 4.
item.author: nicholasdbrady

item.title: MAI-Transcribe-1 on Microsoft Foundry
item.description: Entra-first MAI-Transcribe-1 notebook with Foundry endpoint setup, local audio transcription, diarization, translation, and cost estimation.
item.author: anihitk07

item.title: MAI-Voice-1 on Microsoft Foundry
item.description: MAI-Voice-1 notebook using Foundry endpoint with REST and SDK patterns, long-form synthesis, and character-based cost estimation.
item.author: anihitk07

item.title: MAI-Image-2 and MAI-Image-2e
item.description: MAI-Image-2 and MAI-Image-2e text-to-image notebook with prompt variations, parameter tuning, and token-based cost calculations.
item.author: anihitk07

item.title: MAI-Image-2 in Microsoft Foundry
item.description: Foundry-focused MAI-Image-2 notebook covering deployment-based calls, prompt variants, and cost breakdown.
item.author: anihitk07
